name: @pyreon/example-native-todomvc-web
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — PMTC TodoMVC reference rendered on WEB via @pyreon/primitives runtime. Sibling of native-todomvc-ios (SwiftUI) + native-todomvc-android (Compose). Phase D of the PMTC multiplatform story — proves the canonical primitive vocabulary renders on web end-to-end.
